//mumax 3.12 [windows_amd64 go1.26.0(gc) CUDA-12.9]
//commit hash: 6e5c98bb
//CPU info: Unknown, Error: exec: "wmic": executable file not found in %PATH%
//GPU info: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070 Ti(16302MB), CUDA Driver 13.1, cc=12.0, using cc=120 PTX
//OS  info: Windows OS, Hostname: nachjs-pc1
//Timestamp: 2026-07-07 15:05:33
//(c) Arne Vansteenkiste, Dynamat LAB, Ghent University, Belgium
//This is free software without any warranty. See license.txt
//********************************************************************//
//  If you use mumax in any work or publication,                      //
//  we kindly ask you to cite the references in references.bib        //
//********************************************************************//
//output directory: CoFeB_VCMA_Bext.out/
SetGridsize(64, 64, 1)
SetCellsize(3e-9, 3e-9, 1.5e-9)
Msat = 1.0e6
Aex = 15e-12
alpha = 0.02
anisU = vector(0, 0, 1)
Dind = 0.06e-3
B_ext = vector(0, 0, 0.08)
TableAdd(Ku1)
TableAdd(m)
TableAdd(MaxTorque)
Ku1 = 0.73e6
m = uniform(0, 0, -1)
Relax()
Print("mz = ", m.average(), "  MaxTorque = ", MaxTorque.Get())
//mz =  [-2.1827872842550278e-10 2.0372681319713593e-10 -0.9999837875366211]   MaxTorque =  2.9389481537634464e-08
Save(m)
N := 40
Ku1_start := 0.73e6
Ku1_end := 0.5e6
dKu1 := (Ku1_end - Ku1_start) / (N - 1)
for i := 0; i < N; i++ {
	Ku1 = Ku1_start + i*dKu1
	Relax()
	TableSave()
	SaveAs(m, sprintf("m_%03d", i))
	Print("step=", i, " Ku1=", Ku1, " mz=", m.average())
}
//step= 0  Ku1= 730000  mz= [-2.519300323911011e-10 2.2737367544323206e-10 -0.9999837875366211]
//step= 1  Ku1= 724102.5625  mz= [-1.9463186617940664e-10 1.0913936421275139e-10 -0.9999826550483704]
//step= 2  Ku1= 718205.0625  mz= [-2.255546860396862e-10 -2.4556356947869062e-11 -0.999981164932251]
//step= 3  Ku1= 712307.625  mz= [-3.092281986027956e-10 2.4374458007514477e-10 -0.999979555606842]
